instruction: Identify the top three brands in global wireless earphone shipments (TWS, excluding open-ear/OWS types) from 2020 to 2023. Answer in the format: <answer>PART1; PART2; ...</answer>. Separate multiple items with semicolons (;). Only output the tags, no extra explanation.
